name: configurable-chroma-key-boards
title: Configurable chroma-key production boards
description: Generalize board generation and the cutout background model to an explicitly configured solid key color before enabling #00FF00 boards.
creator: tseka
notes: Do not claim chroma-key support until prompt, detection, alpha-cut, diagnostics, UI parameters, legacy white boards, and regression fixtures share one key-color contract.
